title: agropyron ruthenicum
intro: Agropyron ruthenicum, also known as Roemer's wheatgrass or Elymus ruthenicus, is a perennial grass species native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Agropyron ruthenicum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Agropyron ruthenicum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be consumed as a food supplement in the form of powder or capsules.
